summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GuessIt Football Prediction Platform - Backend APIs and Frontend pages are working correctly. All specified endpoints from review requirements tested successfully with minor expected limitations due to missing Football API key.

minor_issues.issue: WebSocket endpoint returns 404 instead of expected 403/426 for HTTP requests
minor_issues.impact: Low - WebSocket functionality may still work correctly via proper WebSocket connection

minor_issues.issue: No Football API key configured - match loading fails as expected
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - mentioned in review context that this is normal

minor_issues.issue: Redis shows as disconnected in system metrics
minor_issues.impact: Medium - Caching and pub/sub features may be limited

passed_tests: Backend health check (/api/health) - returns healthy status
Backend root (/api/) - returns 'GuessIt API is running' message
Admin login with admin@guessit.com / Admin123! - successful with role verification
Subscription plans (/api/subscriptions/plans) - returns 3 plans as expected
News endpoint (/api/news) - responds correctly with articles array
Homepage renders with header, banner, tabs (Top Matches, Popular, Top Live, Soon, Ended)
League filters displayed (All Matches, UCL, Premier League, La Liga, etc.)
Admin login page (/itguess/admin/login) - renders correctly with proper form fields
Admin login functionality - successfully authenticates and redirects to dashboard
Leaderboard page (/leaderboard) - renders with Weekly/Global tabs and countdown
Login page (/login) - renders with email/password fields and Google OAuth
Register page (/register) - renders with email/password/confirm fields
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issues found: 1) WebSocket endpoint routing (returns 404 instead of 403/426) 2) Redis connection configuration 3) Football API key needed for match data (expected). All core functionality working correctly.
